title: Junior Investment Banker at Zerodha Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Zerodha Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zerodha Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zerodha Advisory Limited:
Zerodha Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
